abstract: Integration guide for the Xquik X (Twitter) real-time data platform. Covers the REST API (99 endpoints across tweet search, user lookup, user tweets/likes/media, favoriters, mutual followers, bookmarks, notifications, timeline, DM history, media download, extractions, monitors, events, webhooks, trends, radar, compose, style analysis, drafts, draws, X account management, write actions, credits, Telegram integrations, flow automations, and support tickets), HMAC webhook verification, MCP server setup for 10 IDEs and AI agents (9 tools including code-execution sandbox and 7 radar sources), all 20 extraction tools, tweet composition with algorithm scoring, credit-based billing, pay-per-use via MPP, and complete TypeScript type definitions. Code examples in JavaScript, Python, Go, and cURL.
